[{"document_id":"cbc97210-df26-52ef-bd9a-7ded1c0ea55c","chunk_id":"4963ef24-f7be-58ec-9767-d596e0351abf","document":"10-email-stormwater-consultant-quote.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/10-email-stormwater-consultant-quote.md","page_or_section":null,"snippet":"From: Kate Morrison <k.morrison@civilflow.com.au>
To: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
Subject: Stormwater / OSD concept advice ÔÇö Chen Residence Lindfield ÔÇö fee quote
Date: 21 May 2026 3:55 PM

Amelia,

Thanks for the survey and geotech. CivilFlow can provide **concept stormwater strategy** for the Chen site:

**Scope:**
- On-site detention sizing desktop (Ku-ring-gai DCP Chapter B13)
- Downstream pipe capacity check against council mapping
- Concept OSD location options given 2.1 m fall and south boundary sewer easement
- One revision and conference with architect

**Fee:** $4,850 + GST
**Programme:** 10 business days from instruction and survey receipt

**Preliminary observation:** Rear yard low point favours underground OSD tank east of garage; overflow to street kerb may need council hydraulic approval ÔÇö we'll confirm in report.

Let me know if owners want us appointed.

Kate Morrison
Principal, CivilFlow Hydraulic Consultants

---

From: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
To: Michael Chen <michael.chen@gmail.com>; Sarah Chen <sarah.chen@gmail.com>
Subject: RE: Stormwater consultant ÔÇö recommendation to appoint
Date: 22 May 2026 10:20 AM

Michael, Sarah,

**What this means for you:** Council will require a compliant stormwater/O SD strategy before DA. Kate's team has Lindfield experience.

**What we need from you:** Approval to engage CivilFlow on the quote attached ($4,850 + GST) by **29 May 2026**.

**What's happened:** Survey shows fall to rear; sewer easement limits south-side storage.

**What's happened:** Survey shows fall to rear; sewer easement limits south-side storage.

**What's next:** If you approve, we issue CivilFlow instruction this week and fold their concept into schematic massing.

**Background:** OSD sizing can affect garage position ÔÇö better resolved before design locks.

Amelia","score":0.016129032258064516},{"document_id":"27710665-8947-5669-8a50-2ea96e0d5e58","chunk_id":"98b7e543-ebb0-51d0-82de-a5039b0c2c0e","document":"11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","page_or_section":"Critical path notes","snippet":"## Critical path notes

- Sydney Water Build Over Sewer may affect garage footprint ÔÇö resolve before DD lock (refer sewer diagram SW-DIA-2070-14-088).
- H1 site classification requires structural footing design before CC pathway complete.
- Principal certifier appointment required before CC application (post DA).

**Author:** Amelia Harrison, Harrison Clarke Studio","score":0.015873015873015872},{"document_id":"3ed88ec4-4511-5b81-bc19-71d1bad42da6","chunk_id":"658883ed-649b-5122-bdd8-defd5a89db47","document":"08-email-sydney-water-sewer-diagram.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/08-email-sydney-water-sewer-diagram.md","page_or_section":null,"snippet":"From: Sydney Water Property Services <propertyservices@sydneywater.com.au>
To: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
Subject: Sewerage services diagram ÔÇö 14 Wattle Grove Lindfield ÔÇö Order #SW-884412
Date: 8 May 2026 2:17 PM

Dear Amelia Harrison,

Please find attached the sewerage services diagram for **Lot 14 DP 789012, 14 Wattle Grove Lindfield NSW 2070**.

**Summary from diagram SW-DIA-2070-14-088:**

- 150 mm diameter sewer main located in **Drainage Easement 2.0 m wide** along southern boundary
- Maintenance hole **MH-4471** within easement at south-west corner of lot
- Minimum clearance to structures per Sydney Water Building Over Sewer policy applies
- **Section 73 or Build Over Sewer application likely required** if proposed footings or slabs encroach within 2.0 m of sewer or over alignment

This diagram is current as at 8 May 2026. For design submissions contact Developer Services.

Regards,
Sydney Water Property Services

---

From: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
To: Michael Chen <michael.chen@gmail.com>; Priya Menon <p.menon@terratech.com.au>
Subject: FW: Sewer diagram ÔÇö Chen site ÔÇö footing set-back implications
Date: 9 May 2026 9:48 AM

Team,

Sewer runs along south boundary in registered easement. Geotech BH-2 is close to this zone. Priya ÔÇö please flag if stiffened raft edge loads need BOS clearance. Michael ÔÇö this may pull garage footprint north by ~1 m unless we pursue formal BOS approval (adds 4ÔÇô6 weeks and Sydney Water fees approx. $3,800).

Amelia","score":0.015625},{"document_id":"87c2e87d-afbc-5d05-9935-42bef54c4061","chunk_id":"0fbe8180-cc3f-561e-a234-711d4e3fb2ac","document":"09-planning-pathway-memo-harrison-clarke.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/04-planning-and-authorities/09-planning-pathway-memo-harrison-clarke.md","page_or_section":"PLANNING PATHWAY MEMO ÔÇö INTERNAL / OWNER ADVICE","snippet":"# PLANNING PATHWAY MEMO ÔÇö INTERNAL / OWNER ADVICE

| Stage | Trigger | Fee (ex GST) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Mobilisation & concept | Engagement signed | $22,000 |
| Schematic & DA package | DA-ready issue | $38,500 |
| Design development | DD issue to builder tender | $32,000 |
| Construction documentation | IFC issue | $36,000 |
| Procurement & contract | Executed head contract | $12,000 |
| Construction administration | Monthly ├ù est. 12 months | $8,000 |

Disbursements (printing, couriers, authority fees on your account) billed at cost + 10%.","score":0.015151515151515152},{"document_id":"27710665-8947-5669-8a50-2ea96e0d5e58","chunk_id":"a607d9e1-20bb-5dfb-9c1f-a9049ba9a2f3","document":"11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","page_or_section":"Stage 1 sub-milestones (extract)","snippet":"## Stage 1 sub-milestones (extract)

| --- | --- | --- |

| Geotechnical report | Complete | Terratech TT-GEO-2026-0442 |
| Survey + dilapidation | Complete | NSS-26-1188, BC-DIL-2026-3319 |
| Schematic design issue | 15 Jul 2026 | Brief locked |
| BASIX commitment | Aug 2026 | Schematic frozen |
| DA lodgement | **Sep 2026** | Owner approval of DA package |
| DA determination | Dec 2026 | Council assessment |","score":0.014925373134328358},{"document_id":"0713102e-1fda-5bb3-b953-b55265b02f14","chunk_id":"4bf36c0b-d02f-5ef0-bc42-0bcde370128f","document":"01-engagement-letter-harrison-clarke-studio.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/02-consultant/architect/01-engagement-letter-harrison-clarke-studio.md","page_or_section":"Scope of services","snippet":"## Scope of services

Our services comprise:

1. Concept and schematic design through to DA lodgement
2. Design development and construction documentation
3. Consultant briefing, appointment support, and coordination
4. Authority and certifier liaison (BASIX, Ku-ring-gai Council, principal certifier)
5. Head builder procurement ÔÇö preparation of tender documentation, evaluation of **two to three** invited builders, and a written recommendation to you
6. Contract administration during construction to practical completion, excluding Superintendent functions under the head contract unless later varied
7. Monthly owner progress reporting and milestone advice

**Exclusions** unless separately agreed: interior design beyond joinery schedule coordination; landscape design (we will brief a landscape consultant if required); geotechnical, survey, and specialist reports (we will coordinate appointments); extra tender rounds beyond one formal head-builder tender; legal advice.","score":0.014705882352941176},{"document_id":"ab16dfb0-a27a-5bb9-8f39-5b9816b06961","chunk_id":"0a913070-b837-5a5c-8a88-07afcdb974c6","document":"02-fee-proposal-harrison-clarke-studio.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/02-consultant/architect/02-fee-proposal-harrison-clarke-studio.md","page_or_section":"Assumptions","snippet":"## Assumptions

- Single DA pathway (CDC not assumed at this stage)
- One formal head-builder tender, three invited builders
- 12-month construction period for CA phase fee
- Owner appoints and pays consultants directly unless noted","score":0.014492753623188406},{"document_id":"4555b289-a071-5ca6-9a6c-0afcfa143d38","chunk_id":"af568c74-a4af-5baa-a4f0-82187cd2bb57","document":"03-owner-project-brief-chen-residence.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/00-brief-pmp/03-owner-project-brief-chen-residence.md","page_or_section":"Document status","snippet":"## Document status

**Owner project brief signed** by Michael and Sarah Chen on 12 May 2026. **Construction budget confirmed:** working budget ceiling **$1,850,000** construction cost (excluding landscaping, loose furniture, and authority fees).

---

**Signed:** Michael Chen, Sarah Chen ÔÇö 12 May 2026","score":0.014285714285714285}]

Subject: Stormwater / OSD concept advice ÔÇö Chen Residence Lindfield ÔÇö fee quote
Date: 21 May 2026 3:55 PM

Amelia,

Thanks for the survey and geotech. CivilFlow can provide **concept stormwater strategy** for the Chen site:

**Scope:**
- On-site detention sizing desktop (Ku-ring-gai DCP Chapter B13)
- Downstream pipe capacity check against council mapping
- Concept OSD location options given 2.1 m fall and south boundary sewer easement
- One revision and conference with architect

**Fee:** $4,850 + GST
**Programme:** 10 business days from instruction and survey receipt

**Preliminary observation:** Rear yard low point favours underground OSD tank east of garage; overflow to street kerb may need council hydraulic approval ÔÇö we'll confirm in report.

Let me know if owners want us appointed.

Kate Morrison
Principal, CivilFlow Hydraulic Consultants

---

**What we need from you:** Approval to engage CivilFlow on the quote attached ($4,850 + GST) by **29 May 2026**.

**What's happened:** Survey shows fall to rear; sewer easement limits south-side storage.
